pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:29 and export_result.sh:9 both reference /home/ga/function_results.txt; task description confirms this path
seed_demodb.py line 51 creates database 'demodb'; confirmed throughout all task files and environment setup
task.json description explicitly names the function 'getAvgHotelStars'; referenced in setup_task.sh:26 and export_result.sh:28
seed_demodb.py lines 225-249: Italy has 3 hotels with stars: Hotel Artemide (4), Hotel Villa d Este (5), Baglioni Hotel Luna (5). Average = (4+5+5)/3 = 14/3 ≈ 4.6667
seed_demodb.py line 232: Japan has 1 hotel with 5 stars (Park Hyatt Tokyo). Average = 5/1 = 5.0

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a function 'getAvgHotelStars' in the 'demodb' database and writes results to /home/ga/function_results.txt. These metadata values are verified. The test data is synthetic, generated by seed_demodb.py containing 15 real hotel names with star ratings. Italy has 3 hotels averaging 4.67 stars (not the claimed 4.5); Japan has 1 hotel with 5.0 stars. The verifier checks expect Italy within [4.4-4.6] and Japan within [4.9-5.1]. The actual Italy average of 4.67 exceeds the verifier's tolerance, indicating a task design error.
